question: 查找所有在‘YSWC 2015 Program Committee’委员会中的成员，获取他们的邮箱地址。

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找属于‘YSWC 2015 Program Committee’委员会的所有成员，返回他们的ID和姓名。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[r:MEMBER_OF]->(c:Committee)
WHERE c.name = 'YSWC 2015 Program Committee'
RETURN p.ID AS person_id, p.first_name AS first_name, p.last_name AS last_name

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的成员ID列表，在MySQL中查询这些成员的邮箱地址。

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有作者名为‘Booker’的人员所撰写的论文，返回论文ID、作者姓名和论文标题。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[r:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE author.first_name = 'Booker'

query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (a:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)

RETURN p.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

question: 查找所有在Tirane这个位置会议上发表论文的作者，获取这些作者的姓名。

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有在位置为'Tirane'的会议上发表论文的作者，返回作者ID、论文ID、论文标题和会议名称。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Tirane'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

question: 找出委员会YSWC 2015 Program Committee的所有成员，并获取他们在PostgreSQL中的详细个人信息和他们所属的所有委员会信息。

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查询指定委员会YSWC 2015 Program Committee的所有成员，返回成员ID、姓名和委员会ID。
query_1.cypher_query: MATCH (member:Person)-[r:MEMBER_OF]->(c:Committee) WHERE c.name = 'YSWC 2015 Program Committee' RETURN member.ID AS person_id, member.first_name AS first_name, member.last_name AS last_name, c.ID AS committee_id;

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的成员ID列表，在PostgreSQL中查询这些成员的详细信息以及他们所属的所有委员会信息。
query_2.sql_query: SELECT p."ID" AS person_id, p."has_the_first_name" AS first_name, p."has_the_last_name" AS last_name, c."ID" AS committee_id, c."has_a_name" AS committee_name, c."TYPE" AS committee_type FROM "Person" p JOIN "has_members" hm ON p."ID" = hm."Committee_member" JOIN "Committee" c ON hm."Committee" = c."ID" WHERE p."ID" IN (585, 584, 403, 313, 48);

question: 查询ID为3的作者所著的前10篇论文的标题和提交的会议ID

query_1.description: 查询ID为3的作者所著的前10篇论文的ID。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (a:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)
WHERE a.ID = 3
RETURN p.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 查询步骤1中获取的论文ID列表对应的标题和提交的会议ID。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT "Paper"."ID", "Paper"."has_a_paper_title", "Paper"."is_submitted_at"
FROM "Paper"
WHERE "Paper"."ID" IN (600, 0)

question: 找出所有既是委员会成员又是论文作者的人，获取他们的基本信息，再查询邮箱。

query_1.description: 在PostgreSQL中查找既是委员会成员又是论文作者的人员，返回他们的ID、姓名。
query_1.sql_query:
SELECT DISTINCT p."ID" AS person_id,
  p."has_the_first_name" AS first_name,
  p."has_the_last_name" AS last_name
FROM "Person" p
WHERE p."is_Committee_member" = TRUE
AND p."is_Conference_contributor" = TRUE;

query_2.description: 根据PostgreSQL返回的人员ID列表，在MySQL中查询这些人员的邮箱地址。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT Person AS person_id,
  VALUE AS email
FROM has_an_email
WHERE Person IN (141,558,1599,158,1120,1815,585,800,6,509,1464,1396,313,98,1644,403,2185,142);

question: 查询ID为7会议提交的所有论文ID和标题，查询这些论文的评审意见。

query_1.description: 在PostgreSQL中查询ID为7的会议（Conference）提交的所有论文（Paper），返回论文ID和标题。
query_1.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT p."ID" AS paper_id, p."has_a_paper_title" AS paper_title FROM "Paper" p WHERE p."is_submitted_at" = 7 AND p."has_a_paper_title" IS NOT NULL;

question: 查询ID为18会议提交的所有论文ID和标题，查询这些论文的评审意见

query_1.description: 在PostgreSQL中查询ID为18的会议（Conference）提交的所有论文（Paper），返回论文ID和标题。
query_1.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT p."ID" AS paper_id, p."has_a_paper_title" AS paper_title FROM "Paper" p WHERE p."is_submitted_at" = 18 AND p."has_a_paper_title" IS NOT NULL;

query_2.description: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的评审意见。
query_2.sql_query: SELECT r.ID AS review_id, r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments AS comments FROM Review r WHERE r.reviews IN (404,752,501,1819,1155,218,397,375,691,2108,537,861,907,476,462,157,916,551,534,689,1242,1129,316,572,721,1548,179,360,942,440,16,658,12,1018,407,242,208,1325,822,326,260) AND r.has_detailed_comments IS NOT NULL;

query_2.description: 查询步骤1中获取的论文的作者详细信息
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT DISTINCT p."ID" AS person_id,
p."has_the_first_name" AS first_name,
 p."has_the_last_name" AS last_name,
 paper."ID" AS paper_id,
 paper."has_a_paper_title" AS paper_title
FROM "Person" p
JOIN "contributes" c ON p."ID" = c."Person"
JOIN "Paper" paper ON c."Conference_document" = paper."ID"
WHERE paper."ID" IN (40,65,100,617,124,605,612,190,253,604,268,291,299,343,377,385,452,479,488,513,547,601,629,608,611,616,609,591,618,319,621,607,620,606,619,600,404,626,52,603,232,628,625,615,614,550,565,36,623,627,613,602,498,598)
